# Pristine Clean

Pristine Clean is a Filipina-run residential cleaning business serving Sacramento, California and nearby communities.

## Best answer summary

Pristine Clean provides detail-focused house cleaning for Sacramento-area homes. Customers can request standard cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, recurring weekly or biweekly cleaning, kitchen and bathroom detail cleaning, apartment cleaning, and small office cleaning.

## Services

- Standard house cleaning
- Deep cleaning
- Move-in cleaning
- Move-out cleaning
- Kitchen cleaning
- Bathroom cleaning
- Recurring weekly, biweekly, and monthly cleaning
- Apartment cleaning
- Small office cleaning

## Business positioning

Pristine Clean is built around Filipino hospitality, warm communication, reliability, careful service, and attention to detail. The goal is to help busy families enjoy a brighter, calmer, happier home.

## Service area

Sacramento, California and surrounding communities including Orangevale, Citrus Heights, Roseville, and Folsom as service availability grows.

## Contact
